TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == == 泰雅族男用名 Qwazyux lalu mlikuy qu Qwazyux. tlalu squ wahi qwayux. mkaraw babaw qhuniq mhuyaw ru qrozyux balay mrkyas. piyang ckaw qqaya squ qnxan tayal. baqun kbalay phangal, pbhul ru niqun. aki yan qwazyux huyaw tl'ux mqyanux muci bnkis. yasa sllwan Qwazyux yabut. qwazyux na rgyax hiya ga, cingay balay qu scukaw nya, kbalay ta qeqaya qnxan. yan nqu khi na qwazyux ga, ckaw nha trhuw squ qqaya. m'iyan nqu trhuw 'lwax ru trhuw squ kiri ru blaq balay nbun qu ayang pori qwazyux uzi. yan nqu gonu ru kiri ru qbubu qwazyux ga knalay na qwazyux kwara qeqaya qani uzi. 細的黃藤可用於 trhuw qqaya ,如 trhuw lwax ,trhuw kiri 等等.另外, .qwazyux 的末端無葉,但有 waqit , qwazyux gonu ,kiri ,qbubu qwayux 等器具的材料.qwazyux .
S.PHON: == == ****** qwazjux lalu mlikuj qu qwazjux. tlalu s~ɕqu waħi qwajux. mkaraw βaβaw qħuniq mħujaw ru qrozjux βalaj mrkjas~ɕ. pijaŋ ʦ~ʨkaw qqaja s~ɕqu qnxan tajal. βaqun kβalaj pħaŋal, pβħul ru niqun. aki jan qwazjux ħujaw tlʔux mqjanux muʦ~ʨi βnkis~ɕ. jas~ɕa s~ɕllwan qwazjux jaβut. qwazjux na rɣjax ħija ɣa, ʦ~ʨiŋaj βalaj qu s~ɕʦ~ʨukaw nja, kβalaj ta qeqaja qnxan. jan nqu kħi na qwazjux ɣa, ʦ~ʨkaw nħa trħuw s~ɕqu qqaja. mʔijan nqu trħuw ʔlwax ru trħuw s~ɕqu kiri ru βlaq βalaj nβun qu ajaŋ pori qwazjux uzi. jan nqu ɣonu ru kiri ru qβuβu qwazjux ɣa knalaj na qwazjux kwara qeqaja qani uzi. ******* trħuw qqaja ,* trħuw lwax ,trħuw kiri **.**, .qwazjux *****,** waqit , qwazjux ɣonu ,kiri ,qβuβu qwajux ******.qwazjux .
S.FORM: == == 泰雅族男用名 Qwazyux lalu mlikuy qu Qwazyux. tlalu squ wahi qwayux. mkaraw babaw qhuniq mhuyaw ru qrozyux balay mrkyas. piyang ckaw qqaya squ qnxan tayal. baqun kbalay phangal, pbhul ru niqun. aki yan qwazyux huyaw tl'ux mqyanux muci bnkis. yasa sllwan Qwazyux yabut. qwazyux na rgyax hiya ga, cingay balay qu scukaw nya, kbalay ta qeqaya qnxan. yan nqu khi na qwazyux ga, ckaw nha trhuw squ qqaya. m'iyan nqu trhuw 'lwax ru trhuw squ kiri ru blaq balay nbun qu ayang pori qwazyux uzi. yan nqu gonu ru kiri ru qbubu qwazyux ga knalay na qwazyux kwara qeqaya qani uzi. 細的黃藤可用於 trhuw qqaya ,如 trhuw lwax ,trhuw kiri 等等.另外, .qwazyux 的末端無葉,但有 waqit , qwazyux gonu ,kiri ,qbubu qwayux 等器具的材料.qwazyux .
S.PHON: == == ****** qwazjux lalu mlikuj qu qwazjux. tlalu s~ɕqu waħi qwajux. mkaraw βaβaw qħuniq mħujaw ru qrozjux βalaj mrkjas~ɕ. pijaŋ ʦ~ʨkaw qqaja s~ɕqu qnxan tajal. βaqun kβalaj pħaŋal, pβħul ru niqun. aki jan qwazjux ħujaw tlʔux mqjanux muʦ~ʨi βnkis~ɕ. jas~ɕa s~ɕllwan qwazjux jaβut. qwazjux na rɣjax ħija ɣa, ʦ~ʨiŋaj βalaj qu s~ɕʦ~ʨukaw nja, kβalaj ta qeqaja qnxan. jan nqu kħi na qwazjux ɣa, ʦ~ʨkaw nħa trħuw s~ɕqu qqaja. mʔijan nqu trħuw ʔlwax ru trħuw s~ɕqu kiri ru βlaq βalaj nβun qu ajaŋ pori qwazjux uzi. jan nqu ɣonu ru kiri ru qβuβu qwazjux ɣa knalaj na qwazjux kwara qeqaja qani uzi. ******* trħuw qqaja ,* trħuw lwax ,trħuw kiri **.**, .qwazjux *****,** waqit , qwazjux ɣonu ,kiri ,qβuβu qwajux ******.qwazjux .
